core_payload.content:
# Agent Evals and Traces

## 1. Role
Every serious N1Hub lane produces replayable traces and structured evaluations by design. The system does not judge major runtime changes only by operator impression. It compares runs, preserves assignment lineage, and inspects recurring failure patterns as explicit engineering evidence.

## 2. Evidence Loop
- structured traces that can be replayed and diffed
- assignment-aware lineage instead of anonymous run blur
- review and validation scores on plans, jobs, and artifacts before promotion
- clustered failure modes that become visible maintenance work
- representative canary suites for prompts, models, routing policy, and harness changes

## 3. Operational Consequence
Operators and agents can ask not only what a lane produced, but how reliable that pattern has been across time, which context and policy framed it, and whether a new configuration genuinely improved the system.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Agent Evals and Traces supports To Dig Deep by making long-lived agent improvement evidence-driven, replayable, and reviewable.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Agent Evals and Traces defines the evidence loop that lets N1Hub improve agents through replayable traces and structured evaluation instead of operator impression. It covers assignment lineage, review and validation scoring on plans, jobs, and artifacts, clustered failure patterns that become explicit maintenance work, and representative canary suites for prompts, models, routing policy, and harness changes. The capsule matters because operators can ask how reliable a lane has been across time, which context framed it, and whether a new configuration genuinely improved the system.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Removed meta-language so the capsule states current doctrine directly.
